title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Ebooks Without Stripe — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and you want to sell ebooks online without relying on Stripe. But PayPal is also out of the question due to country restrictions. Don't worry, there's a better way to monetize your digital creations without being held back by these limitations. Let's dive into the best alternatives to PayPal and Stripe for selling ebooks, and why they're a game-changer for creators in restricted countries. You'll be up and running in no time with the right tools and strategies.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal and Stripe are both popular payment processors, but they come with strict requirements and limitations. PayPal, for instance, has a list of countries where it's not available, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe is also not an option in many countries, due to banking and regulatory issues. Gumroad and Payhip are other popular options, but they too have their own set of limitations and fees. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) provides a complete store infrastructure that includes the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard, with no reliance on PayPal, Stripe, or any other payment processor.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have varying levels of support. Some may restrict certain countries altogether, while others may require additional verification or fees. Unchained Commerce's solution, on the other hand, is designed to work seamlessly across borders, with no KYC requirements and no need for a payment processor account. This means that creators in restricted countries can focus on selling their ebooks without worrying about payment processing headaches.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed and fees are a major concern for creators who want to get paid quickly and efficiently. PayPal and Stripe both offer fast payment processing, but they come with fees that can range from 2.9% to 5% per transaction. Gumroad and Payhip also have their own set of fees, which can add up quickly. Unchained Commerce's solution, on the other hand, offers instant automated delivery, with no fees or subscriptions to worry about. With the Full Stack Bundle, you can sell ebooks and get paid instantly, without any hidden costs.
Don't let PayPal or Stripe hold you back from selling ebooks online. Choose Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle for instant automated delivery and no fees or subscriptions.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is a key feature of Unchained Commerce's solution, which allows creators to set up their store and start selling ebooks with ease. With the Core Engine, you can automate delivery of digital products, including ebooks, courses, and more. The Wallet Connect feature also enables seamless wallet integration, making it easy for customers to pay and receive their ebooks instantly. This means that creators can focus on what matters most – creating great content – while Unchained Commerce handles the payment and delivery details.
